series_metadata.series_description: A repository of all site specific information relevant to the inveestigatio and remediation of known or suspected hazardous substance sites. Illustrative tab headings include: Pre-remedial investiga- tions/site ranking--enforcement (Info. searches, order

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain in operating area for 50 years ; Paper: Retained in operating area until microfilmed. Once microfilm is checked for completeness and accuracy, then destroy, Microform: Wastepaper ; Paper: Wastepaper
